resources.string: Tools are capabilities the AI can call, such as reading notifications, calculating, executing code, etc.
In Assistant detail page → Extensions → Tools, you can enable/disable tools per assistant. High-risk tools (e.g. code execution) require user confirmation before invocation.

Plugins are coarser-grained capability sets that declare required permissions and activation timing. Below is the list of app-preset built-in plugins, for understanding the boundary of AI capabilities.

• Based on WebView V8 engine, isolated from system pages
• fetch / XHR / WebSocket disabled, no network access
• blockNetworkLoads intercepts all network requests
• Default timeout 10 seconds to avoid infinite loops
• User confirmation required before invocation (high-risk tool permission)
